rationale: This is a single opening sentence, not an essay. While the sentence itself is vivid and clear—sensory detail of chlorine, specific distance ('three blocks'), grounded in time ('July')—it does not constitute a personal nonfiction essay in any meaningful sense. There is no structure, no development, no reflection on what the pool revealed about a town, and no fulfillment of the prompt. One line cannot be evaluated for flow, economy relative to purpose, or overall effectiveness as nonfiction.
